name: hiking-data
description: Access hiking log data — trail history, stats, recommendations, and location data from 8+ years of hiking in Washington state.

tools.name: get_hike_stats
tools.description: Get overall hiking statistics, optionally filtered by year or region

tools.name: get_trail_history
tools.description: Get all hikes for a specific trail, with stats and trail info

tools.name: search_trails
tools.description: Search trails by name, region, loved-by, wishlist, distance, difficulty, dog-friendly

tools.name: find_trails_near
tools.description: Find trails near a coordinate or another trail within a radius

tools.name: get_hiking_patterns
tools.description: Analyze hiking patterns — frequency, seasonal trends, day-of-week, progression

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.description: Get personalized trail recommendations based on preferences and history

tools.name: get_all_regions
tools.description: List all regions with trail and hike counts
